description_long: This is a luxurious modern bungalow complex set within a walled, landscaped lot featuring a central swimming pool, multiple cabana-style outbuildings, and a main residential structure. The main building is two stories tall, with a flat roof and expansive terraces overlooking the pool. The pool area is surrounded by lounge chairs and palm trees, creating a resort-like atmosphere. Several smaller, single-story cabanas or guesthouses are distributed symmetrically around the pool, each with a simple, boxy design and flat roofs. The entire property is enclosed by a high, white perimeter wall, providing privacy and a sense of exclusivity. The landscaping includes sandy ground cover and clusters of palm trees, enhancing the tropical, vacation-oriented aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow complex with a central pool, multiple cabanas, and lush landscaping enclosed by a white wall. The design features flat roofs, terraces, and a resort-like layout with palm trees and lounge areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main bungalow, central pool, surrounding cabanas, and lounge chairs, all enclosed by a white wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the linear arrangement of cabanas, dense palm tree clusters, and the main building's terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the white perimeter wall, with palm trees and cabana rooftops visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, main bungalow facade, and the symmetrical layout of cabanas and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large terrace-facing windows and grouped side windows
